name: unit_hierarchy
query: What is the unit hierarchy for Chittoor?
response:
**Unit hierarchy for Chittoor district**

```
IG Rayalseema Region (LO-REO-CTR-RRE)
│
└─ DIG Ananthapur
   │
   └─ Chittoor DPO (parent: DIG Ananthapur)
      │
      ├─ Palamaner SDPO
      │   ├─ Palamaner UPS
      │   │   ├─ Bangarupalem UPS
      │   │   └─ Gangavaram UPS
      │   ├─ Palamaner Rural Circle
      │   │   ├─ Panjani PS
      │   │   └─ Baireddypalle PS
      │   └─ Palamaner Circle Office (Puthalapattu Circle Office) – parent: Palamaner SDPO
      │
      ├─ Nagari SDPO
      │   ├─ Nagari UPS
      │   └─ Nagari Rural Circle
      │       ├─ Nindra PS
      │       ├─ Vijayapuram PS
      │       └─ Narsingarayanipet (N.R.Pet) PS
      │
      ├─ Kuppam SDPO
      │   ├─ Kuppam UPS
      │   └─ Kuppam Rural Circle
      │       ├─ Ramakuppam PS
      │       ├─ Rallabudugur PS
      │       └─ Gudipalli PS
      │
      └─ Chittoor SDPO
          ├─ Chittoor DPO (parent: DIG Ananthapur) – also the hub for the district
          │   ├─ Chittoor DPO (unit) – contains all sub‑units below
          │   │   ├─ Chittoor UPS (multiple)
          │   │   │   ├─ I Town UPS
          │   │   │   ├─ II Town UPS
          │   │   │   ├─ G.D.Nellore UPS
          │   │   │   └─ ... (other UPS)
          │   │   ├─ Chittoor Traffic Urban Circle
          │   │   │   └─ Chittoor Traffic UPS
          │   │   ├─ Chittoor Rural East Circle
          │   │   │   ├─ Chittoor Taluk PS
          │   │   │   ├─ Penumur PS
          │   │   │   └─ Narsingarayanipet (N.R.Pet) PS
          │   │   ├─ Chittoor Rural West Circle
          │   │   │   ├─ K.Nagar Circle
          │   │   │   │   ├─ K. Nagar PS
          │   │   │   │   ├─ Vedurukuppam PS
          │   │   │   │   ├─ S.R.Puram PS
          │   │   │   │   └─ Palasamudram PS
          │   │   │   ├─ Kallur Circle
          │   │   │   │   ├─ Kallur PS
          │   │   │   │   └─ Irala PS
          │   │   │   ├─ Gudipala PS
          │   │   │   └─ Thavanampalle PS
          │   │   ├─ Nagari SDPO (see above)
          │   │   ├─ Kuppam SDPO (see above)
          │   │   └─ Palamaner SDPO (see above)
          │   ├─ Chittoor SDPO (unit) – parent: Chittoor DPO
          │   │   ├─ Chittoor UPS (multiple)
          │   │   │   ├─ CCS Chittoor UPS
          │   │   │   ├─ Mahila UPS, Chittoor
          │   │   │   ├─ PCR, Chittoor
          │   │   │   ├─ DCRB, Chittoor
          │   │   │   ├─ DTC, Chittoor
          │   │   │   └─ SB, Chittoor
          │   │   ├─ Chittoor Mahila Urban SDPO
          │   │   └─ Chittoor Traffic Urban Circle (see above)
          │   └─ Additional support units (DTRB, DCRB, DTC, SB, etc.)
``` 

**Explanation**
- The top‑level policing authority for the Rayalseema region is the **IG Rayalseema Region**.
- Under the IG is the **DIG Ananthapur**, who directly oversees the **Chittoor DPO**.
- The **Chittoor DPO** branches into four main Sub‑Divisional Police Officers (SDPOs): **Palamaner, Nagari, Kuppam, and Chittoor SDPO**.
- Each SDPO contains its own circles, police stations (PS), and Urban Police Stations (UPS). 
- The hierarchy continues down to the level of individual police stations and specialized units (e.g., traffic, crime record, etc.).

This tree captures the complete reporting structure for all police units operating within the Chittoor district as stored in the system.
